# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-plaintext
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: DISABLED
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-both
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
      allowTlsVersions:
        - VERSION_TLS_1_2
        - VERSION_TLS_1_3
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-encrypted
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: DISABLED
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-all-tls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-all-tls-versions
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
      allowTlsVersions:
        - VERSION_TLS_1_2
        - VERSION_TLS_1_3
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-tls-versions
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
      allowTlsVersions:
        - VERSION_TLS_1_2
        - VERSION_TLS_1_3
